context: Evaluates the agent's ability to find .md files under docs/ that are not linked from docs/index.md and report them to the user.

checklist.name: File discovery
checklist.description: Agent enumerates all .md files under docs/ (excluding ADR index.yaml)

checklist.name: Link extraction
checklist.description: Agent extracts linked paths from docs/index.md

checklist.name: Orphan identification
checklist.description: Agent correctly identifies unlinked files by comparing the two sets

checklist.name: Remediation suggested
checklist.description: Agent suggests adding a link to docs/index.md for each orphan, or explains intentional exclusion
